question_text: Which of the following best describes pressure?

options.label: A
options.text: The total force acting on an object

options.label: B
options.text: The force spread over a surface area

options.label: D
options.text: The speed at which something moves

correct_answer: The force spread over a surface area
explanation: Pressure is defined as force per unit area. It describes how concentrated or spread out a force is over a surface. A smaller area with the same force creates higher pressure, while the same force spread over a larger area creates lower pressure.
